raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "PFAS compounds have been linked to health problems, including breast and other cancers.",
    "PFAS exposure is associated with hormone disruption, kidney and liver damage, thyroid disease, developmental harm, and immune system disruption.",
    "Viable alternatives to PFAS in menstrual products are available.",
    "PFAS cannot be metabolized and instead accumulates in the human body.",
    "Exposure to PFAS and the accrual of these chemicals pose long-term health risks.",
    "High rates of contaminant exposure in the vaginal area have been linked to accelerated ovarian aging.",
    "High rates of contaminant exposure in the vaginal area are associated with period irregularities.",
    "High rates of contaminant exposure in the vaginal area may be connected to ovarian disorders like polycystic ovarian syndrome."
  ]
}
```
